programme.title: Blow Out
programme.desc: A Philadelphia sound-effects man witnesses and records a car accident that turns out to be a politically motivated murder.

programme.title: Bubba Ho-Tep
programme.desc: Switching with an impersonator before his "death" and missing his chance to switch back, Elvis ends up at a nursing home in Texas. With a resident who thinks he's JFK, Elvis must battle evil who has chosen their care facility as his hunting grounds.

programme.title: The Belko Experiment
programme.desc: Welcome to Belko Industries, a normally calm workplace that's about to devolve into a blood-soaked battle royale of bone-crunching horror when 80 employees are locked in their office building and forced to play a ruthless game of kill or be killed!

programme.title: Gridlocked
programme.desc: Former SWAT leader David Hendrix is forced to babysit Brody Walker, a celebrity on probation. When a police training facility comes under attack by a team of ruthless mercenaries, Hendrix and Walker must band together to fight back and stay alive.

programme.title: Hackers
programme.desc: A neophyte hacker becomes the target of the FBI after he unknowingly taps into a high-tech embezzling scheme which could cause a horrific environmental disaster in this suspenseful drama.

programme.title: Battle Royale
programme.desc: A group of students from a Japanese high school are forced to compete in a battle, killing one another until only one is left standing.

programme.title: Timbiriche La Misma Piedra
programme.desc: Una divertida mirada al último reencuentro del grupo Timbiriche, a 25 años de su creación. Cómo viven entre los ensayos, la gira, los problemas y los hijos.

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: China es una de las civilizaciones más antiguas del mundo y tiene uno de los relatos históricos mejor documentados que existen. Así como una de las estructuras más conocidas e intrigantes del mundo: La Gran Muralla China.

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: Civilizaciones perdidas, naufragios, criaturas marinas y tesoros hundidos... nuestros océanos ofrecen un mundo oculto de secretos por descubrir.

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: Alejandro Magno, Cleopatra, reina de Egipto, Vlad III Dracul, príncipe de Rumania, el legado de estos iconos históricos vive en nuestra cultura moderna, pero las misteriosas circunstancias que rodean su muerte.

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: La arquitectura antigua se erige como un testimonio duradero del logro humano. Los arqueólogos estudian la arquitectura del pasado para revelar pistas sobre las civilizaciones antiguas que los crearon

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: La inexplicable aparición de formas geométricas en varios lugares alrededor del planeta ha desconcertado a arqueólogos, científicos e investigadores. Estos diseños desconcertantes forman figuras misteriosas.

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: Desde que tenemos registro del tiempo, los humanos han tratado de comprender los complejos ecosistemas en los que prosperamos y sobrevivimos. También la forma en que estos han evolucionado.

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: A pesar de su nombre, la Edad de Bronce se considera una edad de oro de la civilización: un período de casi dos mil años de avances sociales y tecnológicos en armamento y herramientas, cultura y sociedad.

programme.title: Misterios de la tierra
programme.desc: Las desapariciones no resueltas de barcos, aviones e incluso trenes han intrigado a científicos y aventureros durante décadas.

programme.title: Cuba, Embracing its Future
programme.desc: A leading site for fashion and legendary concerts, Havana is reconnecting with its past as a rhythmic hotspot, as is Santiago de Cuba, the birthplace of Cuban music. Experience "La Cubania," or, "The essence of Cuban identity.”

programme.title: Cuba, Embracing its Future
programme.desc: What other country can pride itself on having eaten organic food for the past 20 years, on deriving 30% of its energy from renewable sources, being a pioneer in ecotourism, and having a Ministry for Climate Change? The answer? Cuba!

programme.title: Timbiriche La Misma Piedra
programme.desc: Una divertida mirada al último reencuentro del grupo Timbiriche, a 25 años de su creación. Cómo viven entre los ensayos, la gira, los problemas y los hijos.

programme.title: Miradas sin filtro
programme.desc: Un recorrido que solo ha dejado aprendizaje, unidad en un solo palpitar y sorpresas pendientes por descubrir.

programme.title: Miradas sin filtro
programme.desc: La diversidad étnica existe a nuestro alrededor, conocer su esencia será el comienzo. La primer parada será en Santa Maria Acapulco, el inicio de la aventura.

programme.title: Miradas sin filtro
programme.desc: Tacoyol, el nuevo hogar para la etnia Pame, los misterios continúan.

programme.title: Miradas sin filtro
programme.desc: La variedad de la cultura es inmensa, al igual que el lugar donde se vive cada etnia, el semidesierto queretano cobija la cultura otomí.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando Clara y su familia se mudan a una pequeña casa en la zona rural de Hinsdale, Nueva York, se dan cuenta de que la paz de la vida en el campo es simplemente una ilusión y que la amenaza de muerte es muy real.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La casa de rancho de Ed y Beth parece el lugar perfecto para criar a su niño pequeño hasta que descubren que no están solos, y una espesa niebla oscura se cierne sobre la casa y crece día a día.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la vida, las personas pueden vivir atormentadas por sus propios crímenes. Lo mismo también puede ocurrir en la muerte: espíritus enojados pueden quedar varados en el mismo lugar donde perdieron su humanidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan diferente podría ser nuestra realidad si no pudiéramos sentir y comunicarnos de las formas más convencionales? Para Marie, este es un tema que forma parte de su día a día. Su hija Julie padece un problema mental que la debilita.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Algunas personas creen que los fantasmas son espíritus humanos que deben lidiar con asuntos aún pendientes y que quizás puedan necesitar la ayuda de los vivos con el fin de encontrar la paz entre los muertos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Deb y Tony acaban de comenzar su vida juntos. Con su primer hijo en camino, la pareja trabajadora se muda a una pintoresca casa en Atchison, en el estado de Kansas, con muchas esperanzas para el futuro.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la isla de Taiwán muchas personas creen que no existen fronteras entre el mundo material y el reino espiritual. Los fantasmas forman parte de la vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la Biblia se relata una historia en la cual Jesús y sus discípulos un día se toparon con un paria que se encontraba poseído. Cuando Jesús le preguntó a ese hombre cómo se llamaba, este le respondió que, dentro de él.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Se ha dicho que cada fotografía roba una parte del alma de un hombre. Entonces, ¿qué ocurre con todas esas partes cuando la persona ya ha fallecido?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los niños a menudo se encuentran a merced del mundo de los adultos y, algunas veces, se sienten incapaces de influir en el curso de sus propias existencias.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la inocencia de la infancia, el miedo es perfecto y no resulta influenciado por la racionalidad adulta, lo cual supone que se puede comprender a cabalidad el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Algunas personas creen que todo nuestro conocimiento del mundo nos llega a través de la percepción sensorial y de los poderes del razonamiento. Otras, en cambio, piensan que podemos obtener conocimiento por medio de la intuición.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La dinámica de las personas que viven bajo un mismo techo debe tener un equilibrio delicado. Mike y su novia, Lisa, mantienen una relación sana y, sin nada que les preocupe, se mudan juntos, pero no están solos en su nueva casa.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ciertos mitos nativos norteamericanos hablan de criaturas sobrenaturales que protegen a los muertos. Los primeros exploradores de algunas tribus algonquinas del noreste de los Estados Unidos contaban historias sobre hombres lobo.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: Luego de su intento fallido por subir el Pico de Orizaba, Mónica Muñiz llega a la zona cafetalera. Ahí conoce el mole tradicional, una fiesta patronal y el café de altura.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: Muy cerca de Xico, nos encontramos con Coatepec, primer pueblo mágico de Veracruz y nuevamente la gastronomía hace gala del lugar. Desde el pan artesanal, hasta un banquete en el faro del Cerro de la Serpiente.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: En esta ocasión, Mónica Muñiz decide ser extrema y se dirige a Jalcomulco para conocer su río. Allí se pueden hacer diferentes actividades como tirolesa, rapel y rafting.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: Mónica Muñiz conoce La Antigua, el primer pueblo fundado en Mesoamérica por parte de Hernán Cortés, y decide recorrer sus rincones, su historia y su basta y deliciosa gastronomía.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Enriquecidos por su experiencia, aquellos que transportan la ciudad de Nueva York revelan sus lugares favoritos, sabiduría, consejos y secretos a la ciudad del movimiento perpetuo que conocen tan bien.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Desde el Palacio Ducal hasta la Piazza San Marco y el carnaval, Venecia es famosa en todo el mundo. Sin embargo, son los canales los que hacen que Venecia sea tan especial.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Al subir a un taxi tuk tuk tailandés, Tony trata de absorber la cultura tailandesa y perderse en la gastronomía de Chiang Mai, Tailandia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Tony regresa a su amada Hanoi, Vietnam, para visitar a su amigo, Linh en la festividad del año nuevo lunar vietnamita del Tet. Juntos disfrutan de las vacaciones y disfrutan de todos los placeres exóticos que ofrece la cultura vietnamita.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Una parada espontánea en Bangkok, Tailandia, conduce a Tony a la ciudad, donde se prueban platos de piel de rana frita y pla rah, una pasta de pescado que ha fermentado entre los tres meses y un el año.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Esta historia descubre el fascinante mundo de los escarabajos de estiércol y sus incansables esfuerzos como algunos de los trabajadores más duros de la naturaleza.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre: Conoce los suricatos
programme.desc: Este documental se desarrolla en el poderoso desierto de Kalahari de Sudáfrica. Sigue a una familia de suricatas gregarias por un día, dirigida por una hembra dominante.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: En medio de un viaje, la camioneta de Mónica Muñiz se descompone, quedando varada en algún punto de México. Al saber que su arreglo tomará varios días, decide recorrer los alrededores y llega a Tlacotalpan.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: Luego de afirmar que el quedarse varada es una buena idea, Mónica Muñiz toma el transporte público para llegar a Catemaco, cuna de los brujos y tegogolos, y donde descubrirá la cultura de este pueblo mágico.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: Siguiendo con su viaje, Mónica Muñiz busca una hormiga voladora que se puede comer, no sin antes recorrer un pueblo lleno de aventuras como tirolesa y pinturas rupestres.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Después de ver los impresionantes movimientos de giro de CJ, Par ayuda a CJ a entrenar para una competencia. Cuando Adelaide pierde un diente, Carl y Bobby le enseñan sobre el Ratón, el hada de los dientes de América Latina.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Sid intentan conseguir el autógrafo de Yoon Kwan y Carlota ayuda a Alisa a prepararse para el Festival de Música de Great Lakes City.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y sus amigos ayudan a la señorita Kernicky a conseguir el puesto de profesora de Educación Física, pero sus clases no son ninguna broma. Ronnie Anne y Sid no saben si puede seguir siendo mejores amigas por culpa de un secreto.

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?
programme.desc: This contestant has traveled to outer space, so he's confident he can land on $100,000. He blasts through the questions, but feels the pressure along the way. He even considers cheating when he gets lost in the 5th grade!

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?
programme.desc: An urban farmer puts his brain to the test by answering questions and taking the final exam for his chance to win $100,000!

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?
programme.desc: This law enforcement officer is all about following the rules until he's caught without an answer! Will he cheat to move up the money ladder?

programme.title: Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?
programme.desc: An emergency technician stays calm under pressure and fights her way through the 4th grade. But she's not afraid to ask for a classmate's help in the 5th grade!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Trey thinks Queshia slept with his father Nate and Nate could be the father of their baby. Then, Eric began hearing rumors that his girlfriend Blue was having sex for money while he was taking care of their children. Is Trey right or paranoid?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Ever Have My Baby?
programme.desc: Since he never saw evidence of her pregnancy, Robert is here to find out if his ex-girlfriend Sara was ever pregnant with their child. What will his lie detector results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: These DNA Results Will Floor You
programme.desc: Joe met “Jessica” on a phone chat line. A few months later, she revealed she was pregnant. Then, Chastity claims that her ex Trent fathered her child. What will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Fred deceived his lover Jay, so now Jay wants his just desserts! Next Terry's obsession over his stuffed panda is about to drive his girlfriend away! Then Benny will tell his buddy that he secretly wears women's underwear.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Clover says her mother must either stop selling herself or get out of her life for good! Then Julie is here to confront both her man and his new lover! Next Mary is here to confess to her fiance that she's been prostituting to make ends meet!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: John weighs almost 700 pounds and couldn't be happier. HIs girlfriend Kim goes so far as to make him choose between her and a 10-foot long sandwich! He chooses the sandwich.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Shell wants to come clean about her affairs with 3 separate lovers. Denise reveals that she’s cheating on her lover Becky….with a man!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Desiree and Kim have been dating the same man, Chango, for 6 years! Next Mark's ex-girlfriend wants him back and even lied to him and told him she was pregnant. Today she will be confronted by Mark and his new girlfriend!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Chloe and Dan will tie the knot soon, but she’s finally ready to tell him about her real job. Then Amanda’s mom begs her to quit her job.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jon wants to start fresh and come clean to his fiancee about his secret affair. But first, his secret lover, Kirn, has some news for him! Then Racquel doesn't know why she's here, but when the babysitter arrives, she figures it out in a hurry!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Carla has been cheating on her man with his best friend and his sister! Next Yvonne will tell her friend Marie that she's been sleeping with her boyfriend. Mary Sue and her secret lover, Cory, are here to confront Mary Sue's boyfriend, Scott.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jessyca thinks that Shon and Mellisa may be having a secret relationship. Christine is here to tell her friend Chelsie that Carl isn't the faithful boyfriend she thinks he is. Plus, Char's man, June, gets revenge by having sex with Erin.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tracy and Allen have been living in a car. Her two older sisters are here to convince her to temporarily live with them and go back to school until he can provide for them.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Lisa says she can't stand the constant meddling by her boyfriend's ex, Sarah. Next Deborah suspects that her long-time girlfriend has been cheating on her. Later, Angelina was pregnant when her husband had an affair.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Our guests say they're ready to come clean. Yolando regrets sleeping with her best friend’s boyfriend and Cameron has been hiding a secret from his roommates.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Pamela aims to weigh 40 pounds. Samantha, who suffers from bulimia and alcoholism, steals to accomplish her binging. Can both women confront their eating disorders with support and treatment?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¡Kristy quiere que su madre, Donna, le devuelva su bebé! Donna afirma que se llevó al bebé porque nació con graves discapacidades debido a que Kristy consumió drogas durante el embarazo. ¿Quién está mintiendo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Aeshia ha venido a demostrar a Terrence y a su esposa Lashondra que Terrence es el padre de su hijo, pero Lashondra sabe que se equivoca. Tanto Shaunah como Chris se han convencido de que les son infieles. ¿Quién es el padre?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La relación de dos años de Anastasia y Robert terminó cuando él escuchó rumores de que ella le era infiel. Ella dice que siempre le ha sido fiel, pero Robert no le cree y ahora duda que sea el padre de su bebé recién nacido.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dice que desde que llegó a casa del trabajo y encontró a su hijo de un año con un ojo morado, ha temido que la niñera de sus hijos los lastime. La niñera Cheryl niega las graves acusaciones acerca del niño.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Thornton dice que no puede confiar en su novia infiel Crystal y quiere que se someta al detector de mentiras. Además, Stephanie quiere demostrarle a su marido, Mathew, que no está teniendo sexo con un miembro de su familia.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Deshawn afirma que su ex Lynette abandonó a su hijo de 5 años. Pero ella afirma que él la está alejando de su hijo. Sin embargo, Deshawn se enteró recientemente de que no está en el certificado de nacimiento de su hijo, ¡así que quiere una prueba de ADN!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dio a luz a un niño y cree que Brandon es el padre. Pero Brandon afirma que no supo del niño hasta tres años después y niega ser el padre. Stephanie y su mamá quieren que Brandon se haga cargo.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Megan quería saber si su novio Devin era infiel. ¡Pero salieron a la luz secretos de relaciones aún peores! Además, te sorprenderá saber por qué Laura y Steven necesitan que Steve los ayude otra vez.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desmond cree que su ex, Cassandra, está inventando todo un cuento de que él ha tocado a su hijo porque está celosa de su nueva prometida. Después, Tammy ha sido investigada por abuso infantil e incluso acusada de encerrar a sus hijos en un armario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Russell quiere volver a reunir a su familia luego de que sus 3 hijos murieron en un incendio. Después, Tatiana cree que su sobrino de 2 años sufrió abusos. Además, acusa al ex-prometido de su hermana, Chris. Chris dice que no es un abusador.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Curtis se sentó con su madre Telisha, y le dijo que está tratando de tener un bebé, pero Telisha se horrorizó y se preocupó porque Curtis apenas tiene 13 años. Curtis asegura que está listo para ser padre.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kelsey dice que su marido la maltrata. Malcolm cree que Kelsey le ha sido infiel desde el principio y que sus dos hijos pueden ser de otro hombre. Además, el novio de Carrie, Chris, cree que su hijo es de su ex.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Monique quiere probar que Chris la atacó cuando la llevó a casa después de una fiesta. Chris niega haber hecho algo malo y dice que Monique estaba demasiado borracha como para ser consciente de lo que pasó.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Devon entró en coma y está conectado a un sistema de soporte vital. Antes de caer en coma, le dijo a su madre que su ex, Alisha, le dijo que no era el padre de su hijo. Alisha niega haber dicho esto y siente que toda su familia le ha dado la espalda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario llega a la oficina de Patricio y lo agarra por la pechera, para reclamarle por haber obligado a Rosaura a casarse con él.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Doña Cruz está consolando a su nieta, Rosaura, y al abrazarla cae desploma sobre la cama. Patricio habla con su abogado, con la intención de quitarle todo a Doña Cruz.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura y Luis Mario le dicen a Jimena que el bebé se murió. Patricio y Camelia siguen preparando la trampa para casarse con Rosaura. Jimena está muy mal, entonces Rosaura y Luis Mario tratan de calmarla.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Eva se besan y hablan de su hijo. Maximiliano le dice a Rosaura que el la ama y quiere casarse con ella, que él es libre, no como Luis Mario, quien está casado y no podrá hacerla su esposa.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario besa a Rosaura y luego la deja, empujándola y llamándola engreída y minina. Fernando le cuenta a Bruno todo lo que pasó. Bruno le dice que esa es su casa y ellos su familia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Iván le reclama a Patricio lo de Karina y él le da un puño, tirándolo al suelo. Minerva lo llama cobarde y Iván también lo llama cobarde. Camelia se ríe y se va. Ni Eduarda ni Jimena quieren comer.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda se desespera en el momento en que se entera que Rosaura y Patricio se van a casar, razón por la cual va al estudio en busca de un revolver para matar Rosaura o al Patricio.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura se dirige a cancelar la cuenta del hotel en Las Vegas para volverse a su casa. En el camino se encuentra con Patricio, quien iba a su habitación.

programme.title: One America News
programme.desc: The latest breaking national and international news.

programme.title: Real America With Dan Ball
programme.desc: Real America with Dan Ballbrings you the latest political headlines, by interviewing news makers of the day, to include politicians, lawmakers, pundits, celebrities and social media influencers.

programme.title: Ivory Hecker Tonight
programme.desc: Ivory Hecker Tonight is an uncensored political news talk show that prioritizes filling in the blanks when politicians and media outlets lie through omission. Ivory prioritizes curiosity and citizen questions over loyalty to any political party.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats wage a death-defying battle with a group of flying fish, and Luffy is shocked by the familiar face of their latest enemy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji squares off against his lookalike, Camie shows off just how fast a mermaid can swim, and Luffy defeats a giant bull without even landing a blow!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After their showdown with Duval, Luffy and the Straw Hats enjoy a hearty meal before proceeding to the site of their next adventure – an island bursting with bubbles!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew stop at an island overflowing with bubbles to get their ship modified for underwater travel, but it's not long before they stumble upon an outrageous explosion and attract unwanted attention.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shakky explains why Sabaody Archipelago seems to be crawling with bounty hunters – eleven of the Grand Line's most wanted pirates are currently ashore and two of them are in Luffy's crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger keeps Zoro from tangling with a powerful Celestial Dragon, and Chopper goes bonkers when Camie disappears from the amusement park.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Camie was abducted by a dastardly gang of kidnappers, and her next stop is the auction house unless the Straw Hats can rescue her. To make it in time, they'll have to hitch a ride on some flying fish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With a little help from their fishy mates, the Straw Hats make it to the auction house in time to save Camie, but explosive elements prevent them from taking her back by force. Luckily, Nami's concocted a very generous plan!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami's plan to save Camie goes belly up when a snot-nosed Celestial Dragon outbids the Straw Hats. Luffy and Zoro make an explosive arrival at the auction house and promptly open up a deadly can of worms.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy turns a mermaid auction into a pirate-style brawl when he knocks the snot out of a Celestial Dragon. With a fleet of marines out to get them, the Straw Hats will have to fight their way off the island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: They saved Camie from the auction block, but now the Straw Hats are surrounded by a fleet of marines. Lucky for Luffy, Eustass "Captain" Kidd and Trafalgar Law are ready to join the fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats join forces with Kidd's crew and Trafalgar's mates to make short work of the marines, but they're in for a surprise when they encounter a Warlord of the Sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew duck the marines by hiding out at Rayleigh's house. While Chopper tends to Hachi, Rayleigh entertains the Straw Hats with tales of his days as first mate on Gold Roger's ship.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Admiral Kizaru has arrived to lead the marines on a mission to wipe out all pirates. Meanwhile, Luffy and his crew prepare for a deadly battle with one of the Warlords of the Sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A groovy pirate belts out a tune that leaves Kizaru in pieces, but the admiral pulls himself together in time for a crushing Light Speed Kick. Luffy and Sanji try to protect the injured Zoro from a Warlord lookalike.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats narrowly defeat a robot that resembles one of the Seven Warlords of the Sea. But before the dust settles on the field of battle, a far deadlier foe comes looking for a fight.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro's barely breathing, and Admiral Kizaru is ready to stomp him into oblivion. The battered and beaten Straw Hats could certainly use a powerful friend right about now.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: One by one, the mighty paw-print of Bartholomew Kuma makes the Straw Hats disappear until only Luffy remains. To where did his mates vanish? And will he ever see them again?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yesterday, the Straw Hats valiantly battled a Warlord of the Sea. Today, Boss Luffy and his friends at the Pinwheel Diner prepare to compete in the Great Portable Shrine Race!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thriller Company sabotages the race for a sacred treasure, and the displaced Straw Hats must pull an all-nighter to rebuild their shrine and score some ancient gold!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy finds himself stranded and starving on a strange island. The rubber-man's amazing appetite puts his manhood in danger when he devours an array of exotic mushrooms!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An army of scantily-clad women warriors want to investigate Luffy's family jewels, but the captain of the Straw Hats is more interested in reuniting with his lost mates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The women chasing Luffy are loyal subjects of Boa Hancock, the curvaceous Warlord of the Sea. This stone-cold beauty is deadly, and she's about to pick a fight with an entire fleet of marines!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's search for a seaworthy vessel leads to a "drop-in" on the Snake Princess during the royal bathing hour. The view is world-class, but it might turn the rubber-man to stone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock makes Luffy mad when she turns Margaret into a statue. The Snake Princess may have bitten off more than she can chew by challenging the captain of the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Snake Princess pits Luffy's Gum-Gum abilities against the incredible Haki power of her serpentine sisters in a fight to the death. Will Luffy survive long enough to save his statuesque friends?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy kicks his attack mode into Second Gear to save a precious statue, and the snake sisters start to feel the Straw Hat heat. At the battle's climax, Luffy makes an impression on his opponents.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon

programme.title: The Disappearance of Susan Cox Powell

programme.title: The Disappearance of Susan Cox Powell
programme.desc: A defensive husband flees justice after the disappearance of his wife drags both of their families down deeper into destruction and tragedy.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers

programme.desc: Don and the team come under pressure when a former FBI subcontractor shoots an agent inside the FBI headquarters and takes one of their own as a hostage, leaving them with a severely restricted plan of action.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Charlie becomes the target of physical intimidation aimed at disrupting his work on the case of a missing investigative journalist.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team work to track down a serial rapist who is using his position as a police officer to lure his victims.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team take down an inner-city meth lab, but it is Don's FBI instinct that leads to the arrest of a bystander who is discovered to have a greater scheme in the works.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don's old flame Robin Brooks returns to California to prosecute an incarcerated criminal, but when three witnesses involved in the case are murdered, Don and his team realize that the next victim may be Robin and must work to keep her safe.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team tracks a gang of military thieves after they kidnap family members of an ex-marine who is wanted for murder.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A mass poisoning at a cult compound leads the FBI team into a maze of old grudges and a complex murder plot.

programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a rap star, the team uncovers a conspiracy of embezzlement and bribery which may be connected to his death. Meanwhile, Charlie prepares to meet Amita's parents for the first time.

programme.desc: Don and Charlie find themselves in conflict over their differing beliefs as they investigate a case involving national security. Meanwhile, Megan faces a crisis of conscience and leaves the team, on the fourth season finale.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team hunt down the killers of two rock climbers in possession of a stolen diamond, while Charlie decides if he should get his FBI clearance reinstated and a new agent joins the team, on the fifth season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When eight people, including two police officers, are executed in a coffee shop, an LAPD detective gets the team on the case, and they uncover a trail of blackmail, romance and corruption. Also, McGowan's investigation of Charlie and Don deepens.

programme.desc: When a passenger train collides with a freight train carrying toxic chemicals, Don, Charlie and the team begin to investigate if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía busca a un sospechoso en un barrio y lo encuentran en un aprieto. Se investiga a un auto estacionado detrás de una iglesia. Un oficial aconseja a una madre joven con un pasado problemático.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una persecución a pie termina con el sospechoso en una situación vergonzosa. Un automovilista llama a la policía cuando un peatón pierde la calma. Un hombre arriesga su relación con malas manías.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor se enoja cuando se le interroga. Durante una persecución a coche un hombre le habla a su esposa y la policía se sorprende. Un mentiroso es atrapado y se le da una prueba de inocencia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Con la policía en los talones, el mundo se le cierra a un sospechoso. Una mujer llorando por su esposo violento llama a la policía. Durante un retén alguien intenta escapar de la policía y su pasado.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso crea un enorme problema cuando decide huir. Una mujer confiesa sus fallas arriesgando su matrimonio. Los agentes investigan a una sospechosa, pero la amiga termina detenida.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Rodeado de oficiales, un pasajero se arriesga. Se enojan dos compañeras cuando una le da de comer huevos a su perro. Un oficial actúa rápido al ver un objeto peligroso en el asiento de un vehículo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un preso en libertad condicional escapa de la policía, pero se le acaba la suerte. Una pareja alega y los vecinos hablan a la policía. Un hombre desorientado tiene un accidente raro y culpa al clima.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una pistola taser se descarga en un sospechoso errático. Un delincuente intenta convencer a los detectives de que no lo vieron cometer ningún crimen. Un oficial supervisa una transacción absurda.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un principiante lamenta su delito y decisiones destructivas. Un conductor no creíble le dice a la policía que es víctima de un crimen. Un oficial anima a una chica con problemas a cambiar su vida.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso huyente inventa excusas para evitar la cárcel. Un conductor durmiéndose pide que la policía no le diga a su esposa. Una llamada de allanamiento causa un tormento en un vecindario.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Alguien con un corazón roto maneja peligrosamente. Se atrapa a un miembro de la Asociación de padres y maestros dando un mal ejemplo. Seguir adelante es difícil para una mujer con un pasado malo.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre buscado huye y la policía va muy cerca detrás de él. La policía persigue a una persona manejando nerviosamente. Un retén arriesga a un auto lleno de gente que tiene mucho que ocultar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales se ven obligados a usar guantes cuando detienen a un sospechoso asustado con una condición grave de la piel. Un futuro papá trata de correr. Un rapero empieza a cantar cuando lo esposan.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson, a comedian, and an astrophysicist talk about black holes, dark matter, and more.

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the air supply failing on the Destiny, a team disembarks to a desert-like planet in search of a mineral needed to scrub the ship's air of carbon dioxide. While one team presses on to find the vital mineral, the other has another goal in mind.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: The crew has been working throughout the night to try and determine why the ship’s power reserves are critically low. But when Destiny’s flight path towards a solar system reveals three planets, the entire crew hopes that one of them is habitable.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: After Netan (Eric Steinberg), and the Lucian Alliance, are undermined by SG-1 yet again, he decides to put a bounty out on their heads. Starring Ben Browder, Amanda Tapping, Christopher Judge, Claudia Black, Beau Bridges, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Mistaken for rebels on an alien planet, SG-1 must play the part of hostage takers in hopes to buy themselves enough time to be rescued before they're executed. Starring Ben Browder, Amanda Tapping, Christopher Judge, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Barely surviving the bombing massacre of a peaceful Jaffa summit, Teal'c (Christopher Judge) must go rogue to track down and stop a Jaffa leader named Arkad (Craig Fairbrass) who plans to take control of the Jaffa nation and deliver them to the Ori.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Vala's (Claudia Black) father Jacek (guest star Fred Willard) contacts Stargate Command wishing to trade information about a series of planned attacks on Earth in exchange for sanctuary on the planet. Also starring Ben Browder and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: In an elaborate plan using Vala Mal Doran (Claudia Black) as bait to capture Adria (guest star Morena Baccarin), SG-1 themselves are surprised when Ba'al (guest star Cliff Simon) intercepts Adria from under them to use in his own evil plan.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: With extinction imminent, the Asgard hand over all their knowledge and technology to SG-1, but not before the Ori launch an attack trying to intercede. Starring Ben Browder, Amanda Tapping, Christopher Judge, Beau Bridges, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As Colonel Jack O'Neill and his team journey to Abydos to confront deadly warriors and laser-firing Death Gliders, O'Neill realizes that this new mission seems hauntingly familiar and that an old enemy has returned to take his revenge on Earth.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: In this suspenseful tale of survival of the fittest, O'Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and the SG-1 team must attempt to remove a Goa'uld larva that has infected Kawalsky's (guest star Jay Acovone) brain … but time is running out!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On the planet Simarka, where the fierce race of Shavadai mistreat females, Capt. Samantha Carter (Amanda Tapping) challenges their ways in a thrilling battle of wits that may bring women equity or forever keep them as second-class citizens.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Returning from a planet with both a civilized and primitive side, all but two of the team become infected and spread a brutal virus. Will Teal'c and Jackson find the cause, or are their colleagues doomed to become Stone Age primitives?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team is sent after the SG-9 team that has failed to return. They find that the team's captain (William Russ), having been treated like a god by planetary inhabitants, is drunk with power and is tyrannizing them. Can they overcome him?

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to the sisters, baby Wyatt's new 'imaginary' friend is actually a demon named Vicus who is trying to win Wyatt's trust to turn him evil. Meanwhile, Piper casts a spell to be able to understand baby Wyatt.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When a person who was killed right in front of Phoebe comes back from the dead to blame her, she becomes guilt-ridden and vulnerable, creating an opportunity for Zankou to steal the Book of Shadows.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After being presumed dead, the Halliwell sisters begin their demon-free existence with new identities.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.desc: Wyatt's school play brings out the competitive nature in Piper when her hand-sewn costume & parenting abilities are criticized by another mother. However things go from bad to worse, because this Stepford-like mother is actually a demon in disguise.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Billie jeopardizes the Charmed Ones' new lives when Agent Murphy spots her using her powers to save an innocent. Meanwhile, Phoebe's overnight trip with Dex comes to a surprising conclusion when Billie casts a spell to make her happy.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Billie must deal with her painful childhood memories of her sister's kidnapping, before she can vanquish her latest demon target, The Dogan. Meanwhile, the press are bombarding the sisters, since the announcement of their teaming with Homeland Security.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.desc: Alex is about to prosecute a man named Karl Mayes. She learns that he hired her father to defend him. Alex's father is a recovering alcoholic and Mayes gets him to drink. Eventually, he's not sure if he can defend Mayes.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: An investigation into the theft of a state-of-the-art military helicopter for use in the drug trade leads Walker to a former fellow Marine Corps officer, who abandoned his unit 25 years ago in Vietnam.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker and Trivette are in the midst of investigating a trio of college students who use the drug Rohypnol to subdue unsuspecting female victims in nightclubs when their friend Darcy Reynolds is raped on her 21st birthday.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Eight years previous, a bank robbery resulted in the sheriff being killed, and the criminals escaping in a small plane. Current day, the plane is found crashed in the mountains. Walker and Alex investigate, riding into the rough country.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A dead mime leads to an investigation of a crooked auto dealer. Randy Wolfe, a woman who's apparently an expert at everything, leads the investigation while continually annoying Steve.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A motorcycle stunt driver has a fatal accident while filming an action video. Steve investigates.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Posing as a visiting missionary, Dr. Sloan goes undercover at a convent to reveal the location and contents of a most mysterious package - a parcel that brought its owner to a sudden, untimely death.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's double trouble for Dr. Sloan in this second season premiere. What could be worse than an IRS tax audit?

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver fights plans for a housing development in an ecologically delicate area.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver travels to Turkey in search of Alexander the Great's tomb and the legendary Eye of Osiris.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver infiltrates a criminal biker gang to help prove a parolee's innocence.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver goes undercover as a homeless person to investigate the murder of a priest.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Pete Thornton agrees to take on the security of an old friend, political refugee Samantha Lora, but finds he can't do the job alone because of a worsening vision problem. He enlists MacGyver's help.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is drawn into a mobster's search for stolen loot while nursing his injured leg at a country bed and breakfast run by two elderly sisters.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Murdoc is ordered to kill MacGyver in order to prove his loyalty to a professional hit squad.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is drawn into a territorial dispute between an Indian reservation and an electric power company.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton reminisce about past adventures as Pete prepares for eye surgery to treat his Glaucoma.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline gets stiffed at her ATM, she meets with bank personnel to retrieve her money. However, because the surveillance camera captured her in an awkward moment, she's too embarrassed to let the bank manager view the tape of her transaction.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Del agree to go to dinner with Annie and Warren, her new boyfriend, they find that Annie left out one minor detail about his background --Warren's an ex-convict with a burglary record.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline finds out the Christmas gift Del gave her might have been extremely expensive, she ponders the message he may be trying to send her about their relationship.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard sets Caroline up on a date with an art council member who happens to hold the key to Richard's future as a successful artist, but when he finds out the man is married Richard wrestles with protecting a friend or furthering his career.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Richard bicker over their shared work space, Caroline finds the perfect solution when she purchases an antique partner's desk from the desk's original owners, writing and life partners Vic Stansky and Stella Dawson.

programme.title: Caroline in the City

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Thanks to the school bully, Pac-Man accidentally opens the portal to the Netherworld, unleashing an army of ghosts. Lucky for Pac-World, young Pac has the ability to eat the ghosts and burp out their eyeballs!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld is under siege by ghosts and there is little Pac-Man can do about it without fresh berries from the Tree Of Life, which is hidden somewhere in the Netherworld and guarded not only by legions of ghosts, but fierce monsters!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and friends keep defeating all his ghosts, Betrayus, with the help of the demented Dr. Buttocks, decides to clone an army of Netherworld monsters. Lucky for Pac, one little monster isn't really a monster at heart.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Dr. Buttocks amps up the stakes by inventing the Molecular Magnifier to create gigantic Monsters. Meanwhile, Pac adopts the little monster that saved his life, but he's in for more trouble than he bargained for.

programme.title: Rated A for Awesome
programme.desc: Les and team try to awesomize Holly Hotley’s boring cat and hypnotize the feline into becoming a super villain who goes on a crime spree. // With his family visiting from Norg, Lars becomes obsessed with putting on the best Glindermaus ever.

programme.title: Rated A for Awesome
programme.desc: When Twitchy gets a mysterious monkey S.O.S. he adds his own awesomization to the kids’ school bus makeover. // An awesomized make-over machine leads to an infestation of GLAMBIES – brainless, superficial followers of the latest trends.

programme.title: Sidekick
programme.desc: Eric is caught in a time loop and is doomed to repeat his day unless he stops it. Then, everyone in town turns into a superhero on this super-haunted Halloween Special.

programme.title: Slugterra: Ghoul from Beyond
programme.desc: Eli and the Shane Gang have vanquished Dr. Blakk and the slugs he turned into feral, mindless weapons—ghouls! But a new threat emerges from beyond the 99 caverns of Slugterra: the Dark Slinger and his troop of Marauders.

programme.title: Oh No! It's an Alien Invasion
programme.desc: SWEET discover the Mall is haunted by a ghost: a grampa ghost. Then, the Swell Mart is under attack by dreaded Werevambies!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus plans to render Pac powerless – by getting Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde to feed Pac so much he'll be too full to eat anything else... power berries or ghosts! But Pac isn't getting full, even when he's eating everything in both worlds!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac and his pals grow suspicious when President Spheros starts behaving strangely. They eventually realize that Spheros has been possessed. Unfortunately, he declares Pac and pals Public Enemies and puts out a city wide Pac-Man-Hunt!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac gets a huge zit right before Class Picture Day. The more stressed Pac gets about it, the more zits appear, so Betrayus sends his meanest-mouthed ghosts to stress him to the breaking point - or in this case - popping point!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and his pals get blasted into the past, he not only finally meets his parents -- and his Baby Pac self – but has an adventure with them during PacWorld War I.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld Kingpin Obtuse is working for Betrayus and uses Skeebo to try and steal Pac's power berries, but the plan backfires when Skeebo uses the berries to turn himself into the super-powered Heebo-Skeebo.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man is physically controlled by Betrayus when he swallows a special micro-chip, and Pac's friends must help him infiltrate the Netherworld spy-style to retrieve the remote controller.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus steals the Repository of the ghosts' corporeal bodies, but not before Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde nab one body to share between them. Then it's up to Pac, Cyli and Spiral to get the Repository back from the Netherworld...

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Sir Cumference tries to show that he is more than just an old scientist, he's still got it as a freedom fighter – but after some disastrous attempts, it soon becomes clear that he isn't quite the fighter he used to be.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld is becoming dangerously hot and its citizens mistakenly blame Sir C! Pac and Friends remain loyal to the elderly inventor and, together; they uncover a plot by Betrayus to terra-form PacWorld into a world just like the Netherworld.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Eggman is making a movie about his life. He even tries to cast Sonic to play a lame version of Sonic. / Knuckles wants to win the village's annual Chili Dog Cook-Off. He sets out on a quest to find the perfect ingredients.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: After a bad experience at Meh Burger, Amy decides to open her restaurant. / A second Knuckles from an alternate dimension becomes stranded in their world and causes trouble for Sonic and his friends.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic realizes he has seven minutes to return Amy's library book and ends up in a race against the clock. / After destroying Amy's couch, Sonic and Knuckles enter a “best friend” game show to win her a new one.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Sonic gets cocky about his survival skills, Sticks and Amy challenge Sonic and Knuckles to the ultimate survival skills contest. / When Knuckles is made mayor for the day, he sends the village spiraling into chaos.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: After Sonic and the gang best Eggman by using his own technology against him, Eggman swears off technology for good. / When Orbot and Cubot discover a group of rejected Cubot prototypes hiding in the jungle, they seek the help of Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Sonic refuses to let Mike, battle Eggman, the town turns against him for being insensitive/ When Knuckles replaces Comedy Chimp on his late night talk show, Comedy Chimp seeks the help of Eggman to steal back the show.

programme.desc: Scaredy has to spend the night guarding the store and comes face to face with a burglar. Then, Scaredy tries to spend more time with his first crush.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy rids a holiday of commercialization. Then, Scaredy's suggestion box proves to be a bad suggestion that he shouldn't have suggested.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy tries to bring the work gang together as a team. Then, when thugs threaten to eat everything in Balsa, Scaredy must protect the store.

programme.desc: Kayla changes Izaiah's last name. Ashley meets up with a friend she's been talking to on social media. Rachel considers birth control. Kiaya agrees to mediation with X'Zayveon's mom. Brianna flirts with the idea of dating again.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Rachel attempts to convince her mother that Hazelee's dad, Drew, is really going to rehab this time, only to find out that he was recently arrested. Brianna and her mother can't stop fighting over Brianna's new friend, and Kayla celebrates.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Kayla is skeptical when she gets a surprise phone call from Stephan's mom Annette asking to meet up. A call from Amour's dad in prison triggers Kiaya to consider finally making amends with his mom, Carla.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Things get physical during a heated confrontation between Kayla and Stephan's mom Annette. Kiaya reconciles with Amour's grandmother Carla, but is shocked when she finds out that Amour's father X'zayvon might still have feelings for her.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: While still reeling from her fight with Stephan's mom, Kayla makes a big life decision for Iziah. A sad anniversary for Kiaya brings up some old feelings. And introducing Kayla J! She struggles to co-parent with her best friend.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Kayla wants Luke to choose between his family & going back to Iowa to play basketball. Meanwhile Kayla J and Makel quickly realize that coparenting their daughter will be harder than expected now that Kayla has issues with Makel bringing new women around.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando llega al hospital con un balazo en el pecho, mientras Juan y Ruth hacen el último esfuerzo por sobrevivir. Antes de huir, Dínora llama a Norma para decirle que Juan no regresará jamás.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Una caravana de rescate recorre el territorio en medio de la noche, las sospechas de que Dínora es la culpable del secuestro son corroboradas al hallar a Juan y a Ruth en un camino solitario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En una fiesta de bienvenida en la hacienda de los Reyes, Juan revela sus temores sobre algo terrible relacionado con Dínora. Fernando no se salva de la furia de las hermanas Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La policía inspecciona con Juan y el papá de Dínora el lugar del cautiverio, donde unas osamentas crean sospechas de posibles crímenes. Franco ve a Sara golpeada y quiere vengarse de Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela castiga a Sara a latigazos al hallarla con Franco en la cabaña, Norma y Jimena encaran de nuevo a Fernando, quien amenaza con irse, pero Gabriela lo detiene, él le hace una propuesta.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela le informa a la familia que Fernando será algo más que el administrador de la hacienda. Sara le confiesa a Martín que está enamorada de Franco y Ruth indaga quiénes son sus padres.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Nuevos sentimientos cambian la vida de Gabriela, sus hijas no la recordaban así desde antes de la muerte de su padre, temen de las intenciones ocultas de Fernando y buscan apoyo en los Reyes.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Las Elizondo saben que se avecina un inminente peligro y que no pueden marcharse de la hacienda a pesar de la nueva actitud de su madre, quien después de su boda luce 20 años más joven.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race for a spot in the finale and a high-stakes foot race to the mat will mark the end of one more team's journey.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As the final three teams race from Shenzhen, China to Santa Barbara, Calif. for the final leg of the Race, they face a gut-wrenching leap of faith.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a brand new twist, all 22 Racers are complete strangers who will meet on the starting line. Before "GO," Racers will immediately compete in a challenge that will determine the order for picking a Teammate, based on nothing but first impressions.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Sao Paulo, Brazil where tensions rise between two teams when one goes back on their word.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers travel to Zanzibar, Tanzania where teams build and deliver desks to a local school. Also, tensions rise when teams face a blind double U-turn, and one team's Race may be in jeopardy when they misplace their passports.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A previously played U-turn causes friction between two teams in Tanzania.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers take on a record setting Roadblock by helping build a 13-story bonfire in Norway.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Several teams come together and target one set of Racers at the double U-turn in Italy.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Venice, Italy where one team reaches a breaking point in a frantic search for a water taxi.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While driving to the Detour, one team ends up going the wrong way, and a surprising U-turn causes friction between racers.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: An extreme fear of heights paralyzes one Racer at a Roadblock when faced with bungee jumping 240 feet from a bridge into the Corinth Canal.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams battle the scorching heat while transporting shrimp baskets for one mile to a local fisherman, and one Racer approaches their breaking point during the exhausting Roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race through Seoul, South Korea to clinch a spot in the finale and a chance to race for the one million dollar prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the one million dollar prize on the line, the final three teams race to Chicago where they must complete their final challenges within the city's most iconic landmarks, including a trip to Wrigley Field, the home of the World Champion Chicago Cubs.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard Morris guest stars as Ernest T. Bass as the Darling clan returns to Mayberry with its own kind of mountain trouble.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife becomes super-efficient in executing his duties as a deputy sheriff after two thieves are jailed in Mayberry until their accomplices are captured.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie accidentally kills a bird with a slingshot and becomes foster-mother to her three young birds.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, Barney and Gomer are a trio of laughs as they tread the boards of a haunted house.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Guest star Howard Morris plays the part of a mountain man very disgruntled with being rejected by the army.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A visiting preacher urges the residents of Mayberry to relax and enjoy the simple pleasures of life--leading to more work for all.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee is the unwilling object of matrimony when mountaineer Briscoe Darling comes a'courting.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gossiping Gomer Pyle moves in with the sheriff when he loses his job and home at the filling station.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ron Howard's real-life father and younger brother appear as Mayberry gets involved with a gold shipment en route to Fort Knox.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie seems in line for a new bicycle as he comes home with an all A report card.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife plays cupid for Gomer when Barney's girl refuses to go to a dance unless her cousin also has a date.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is evicted from his rooming house for illegal cooking and moves into the Mayberry sheriff's office backroom much to Andy's chagrin.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney tickets Gomer for a U-turn and is then detained in a citizen's arrest by Gomer for the same thing.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie and his chums take their roles as Robin Hood and his merry men seriously as they befriend a hobo at the expense of the pantries of Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney organizes a rescue party when Andy and Helen are trapped in a cave by a landslide.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie learns a lesson in friendship when he befriends a newcomer to Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee stirs up a crusade for a chicken farmer whose property has been condemned to make way for a new road.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney adds a vintage motorcycle to the rolling stock of the Mayberry Sheriff's department, to the Sheriff's regret.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ernest T. Bass is a would-be Romeo, who is brought into the sheriff's home in an effort to teach him some manners.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A beautiful prisoner threatens to crumble the security of the Mayberry jail, as both Andy and Barney fall for her charms.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis Campbell acquires a car and threatens life and limb of Mayberry's pedestrian population.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney suffers an ego blow when Gomer out-sings him for a part in the Mayberry Choir. Andy Griffith's wife, Barbara, appears in this episode as a member of the singing group.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney disguises himself as a dummy in an attempt to solve a series of theft at the Mayberry department store.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy takes a week off, leaving Barney and Gomer in charge. A prisoner also takes off in the resultant confusion.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer falls asleep on the job and Andy douses a fire to save his life. Gomer becomes a menace trying to repay the favor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee saves money by buying a side of beef. The beef is tough, the freezer conks out, and Gomer attempts to fix the motor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A strange mountain-style divorce ritual is frustrated by another ritual performed by Barney.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Even a cold, frozen snowy afternoon can be displayed with signs of astonishing beauty, as portrayed by Bob Ross in this lovely yet simple scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: From a quiet spot by this smooth-stoned river, join Bob Ross for a very, very distant view of a lovely snow-covered mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Follow along with the brushes of Bob Ross and step into a beautiful mountain oval - experience the first signs of autumn.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross teams up with Mother Nature and paints an incredibly awesome sky hovering over fantastic, snow-covered mountains and glass-like reflections.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates an oval scene with warm brown and gold tones that captures the essence of a lonely forest river.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the warm swampy air and admire the overgrown trees with hanging Spanish moss and velvety bushes … all Bob Ross style of course!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints the very best of nature -- stately evergreens and cool, still waters standing before a glorious brown mountain. A real beauty!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Gently rolling mountains make an amazing backdrop for this Bob Ross masterpiece; a winding stream and textured ground vegetation provide the rest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Such magnificence in sky and sea! Watch the creative brushes of Bob Ross as he paints an ocean view of incredible beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Tall leafy trees, almighty mountains, and puffy white clouds; a fresh and innovative painting by guest artist Diane Andre.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The trees have shed their snow and ice has begun to thaw, Spring will arrive soon in the incredibly beautiful Bob Ross landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stroll along the beach at sunset with Bob Ross and feel the gentle breezes blow as the waves softly kiss the shore in this oval masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join guest artist Steve Ross today -- experience the magnificence of splendid mountains and glassy lake embraced by leafy trees and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a walk with Bob Ross down a little lakeside path in a secluded place; you'll delight in the discovery of a small uninhabited island.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A wilderness path leads you to the side of a still lake in a setting that Bob Ross accents with an abundance of trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints an old gnarly tree and snow-capped fence to mark the line between home and the edge of the winter blanketed forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you to a lovely spot deep in the woods where the seclusion, silence, and beauty offer serenity to the soul.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross chooses to make a pond in the middle of a darkened forest the subject of today's mood-evoking creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Today Bob Ross paints a warm and elegant snow-kissed scene with a little cabin snuggled deeply into the embrace of foothills, evergreens and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross shows you how two beautiful mountain and evergreen oval scenes can be harmonized into one memorable masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Warm skies, pleasant valley and purple misty mountains - the perfect place to pitch your tent and enjoy the view with painter Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross's icy-blue mountains, evergreens, and lacy-like bush clusters capture the mood of a cold snowy day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross at an old log cabin nestled deep in the powdery woods! An intriguing yet simple painting just beckoning you to paint it yourself.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Elegant mountain lake, silent and still, reflecting the natural beauty of leafy trees and grasses all around - a pretty Bob Ross creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Such magnificent power and vibrant color in the sea and sky! Watch Bob Ross as he tries to tame this beautiful ocean painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A playful brook appears the perfect complement to a range of rugged mountains in this Bob Ross setting on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
